description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly metallic body accented by orange and black components. The weapon has a triple-barrel configuration, with three cylindrical barrels arranged in a triangular cluster at the muzzle, suggesting a high-capacity or multi-shot capability. The stock is angular and compact, with a squared-off rear and a short, blocky grip, providing a modern tactical appearance. A prominent sight or scope is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision. The fore-end includes a visible pump mechanism, and the trigger guard is rectangular and substantial, offering protection and stability. The overall finish is a mix of matte and slightly reflective surfaces, with visible wear and utilitarian detailing.
description: A triple-barrel shotgun with orange, black, and metallic finishes, featuring a compact stock, top-mounted sight, and a robust pump mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, triple barrels, pump mechanism, and top-mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three-barrel muzzle and the orange and black color scheme.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrels, pump, and stock details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's squared-off design and the alignment of the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: triple-barrel, barrels arranged in a triangular cluster with uniform length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, elongated, robust with no visible finger grooves
